Trusted Name for 60+ Years Serving our community for over six decades with integrity, quality, & customer satisfaction  The Hansel Auto Group story begins in 1851. Joseph Hansel first entered the transportation industry selling horse-drawn carriages. Joseph's son continued to build the Hansel name, opening the family's first automotive dealership in 1901. Take our Certified Pre-Owned and Certified Pre-Owned Select vehicle programs, for example. From our rigorous vehicle inspections to our confidence-inspiring warranties and other exclusive benefits, INFINITI's Certified Pre-Owned program means you can drive the car, crossover or SUV of your dreams at a pre-owned value, all while enjoying the luxury of true peace of mind in the process. Vehicle History..See dealer for details..What the reviews say..The QX60 just got a new engine last year, but Infiniti wasn't done updating its midsize SUV. For 2026, the QX60 gets an exterior refresh that takes cues from the recently redesigned QX80. The revised grille is more angular and features an illuminated Infiniti emblem. The headlights and taillights have also been restyled, with daytime running lights featuring LED technology and segmented into separate elements. In addition to the new look, the 2026 QX60 gets a new 12.3-inch touchscreen infotainment system running Google Built-In infotainment and navigation, which is standard across the lineup along with a matching 12.3-inch instrument display. The new system also now supports wireless Android Auto alongside wireless Apple CarPlay. The QX60's available premium audio systems, which used to wear Bose branding, are now supplied by high-end speaker maker Klipsch. How comfortable is the INFINITI QX60? One of the hallmarks of a luxury SUV is a quiet interior and the QX60 certainly delivers. The QX60's climate control is another strength. The system is easy to understand and operate, and it features roof-mounted air vents for second- and third-row passengers for better airflow. Fit and finish, as well as the quality of materials, is very good not only for Infiniti but also for the highly competitive class.[!@@Additional Info@@!][S55] LITERATURE KIT,MINERAL BLACK,[E10] This exceptional SUV is a true force to be reckoned with, blending unparalleled power, advanced technology, and refined style to create a driving experience that is both exhilarating and effortless.  Elevate your journey with the following premium features:   Wheels, 22" x 9" Polished Aluminum  Volcanic Red Tintcoat Exterior  Seats, Second Row Bucket, Power Release  Engine Block Heater  Step inside and be captivated by the Yukon XL's premium cabin, featuring the 16.8" Diagonal Premium GMC Infotainment System, Bose 10-Speaker Surround Sound, and a suite of advanced connectivity and safety technologies. The available Preferred Equipment Group 4SA offers a wealth of additional conveniences, including a Power Liftgate, Heated Steering Wheel, and Rear Window Wiper.  Beneath the sculpted exterior lies the heart of this remarkable SUV  the EcoTec3 5.3L V8 engine paired with a smooth-shifting 10-Speed Automatic transmission. This powertrain delivers a commanding 4WD performance, effortlessly tackling any terrain or towing task with confidence. Enjoy an EPA-estimated 15 MPG in the city and 18 MPG on the highway, ensuring you can go further without compromising capability.  The 2026 GMC Yukon XL Elevation is a true masterpiece of engineering, designed to elevate your driving experience to new heights. With its uncompromising quality, advanced technology, and exceptional versatility, this SUV is the ultimate expression of power and refinement. Experience it for yourself and discover the difference that the Yukon XL can make in your life.  We invite you to visit our showroom and explore the 2026 GMC Yukon XL Elevation in person. Our knowledgeable sales team is here to answer any questions you may have and guide you through the purchasing process. Take our Certified Pre-Owned and Certified Pre-Owned Select vehicle programs, for example. From our rigorous vehicle inspections to our confidence-inspiring warranties and other exclusive benefits, INFINITI's Certified Pre-Owned program means you can drive the car, crossover or SUV of your dreams at a pre-owned value, all while enjoying the luxury of true peace of mind in the process. INFINITI Certified Pre-Owned Details:Limited Warranty: 72 Month/Unlimited Mile from original in-service date. 1-Year Prepaid Service Visit Included. 6 Year/75,000 Mile Warranty for Vehicles With Less Than 15,000 Miles at Time of Certification. 6 Year/Unlimited Mile Warranty for Vehicles with 15,001-60,000 Miles at Time of Certification. INFINITI ONLY Models Qualify. Transferable Warranty. Roadside Assistance. 167 Point Inspection. Warranty Deductible: $0. Vehicle History..See dealer for details..What the reviews say..The QX60 just got a new engine last year, but Infiniti wasn't done updating its midsize SUV. For 2026, the QX60 gets an exterior refresh that takes cues from the recently redesigned QX80. The revised grille is more angular and features an illuminated Infiniti emblem. The headlights and taillights have also been restyled, with daytime running lights featuring LED technology and segmented into separate elements. In addition to the new look, the 2026 QX60 gets a new 12.3-inch touchscreen infotainment system running Google Built-In infotainment and navigation, which is standard across the lineup along with a matching 12.3-inch instrument display. The new system also now supports wireless Android Auto alongside wireless Apple CarPlay. The QX60's available premium audio systems, which used to wear Bose branding, are now supplied by high-end speaker maker Klipsch. How comfortable is the INFINITI QX60? One of the hallmarks of a luxury SUV is a quiet interior and the QX60 certainly delivers. The QX60's climate control is another strength. The system is easy to understand and operate, and it features roof-mounted air vents for second- and third-row passengers for better airflow. Fit and finish, as well as the quality of materials, is very good not only for Infiniti but also for the highly competitive class.[!@@Additional Info@@!][S55] LITERATURE KIT,MINERAL BLACK,[E10] Paired with an advanced 6-speed automatic transmission with overdrive and Sportmatic, this SUV provides a responsive and engaging driving experience. Its front-wheel-drive (FWD) system ensures excellent handling and control, making it a joy to drive on both highways and winding roads.Advanced Safety Features for Peace of MindSafety is a top priority in the 2019 Kia Sportage EX. Equipped with cutting-edge features like Blind-Spot Detection, Hill Start Assist Control, and Electronic Stability Control, this SUV is designed to keep you and your passengers safe. The ABS (4-Wheel) braking system provides reliable stopping power, while the Traction Control system ensures stability in various driving conditions. With Dual Air Bags, Side Air Bags, and F&R Head Curtain Air Bags, you can drive with confidence knowing you're well-protected.Comfort and Convenience: Interior Features of the 2019 Kia Sportage EXStep inside the 2019 Kia Sportage EX and experience a world of comfort and convenience. The interior is designed with premium materials, including leather-trimmed seats that provide a touch of luxury. The heated front seats ensure a cozy ride during chilly mornings, while the power-adjustable driver's seat allows you to find your perfect driving position. Other features like Keyless Entry, Push Button Start, and Cruise Control make every journey effortless and enjoyable.Technology at Your Fingertips: UVO eServices and MoreThe 2019 Kia Sportage EX is packed with advanced technology to keep you connected and entertained. The UVO eServices system provides seamless smartphone integration, allowing you to access your favorite apps and features on the go. With Bluetooth Wireless connectivity, you can make hands-free calls and stream music effortlessly. The AM/FM Stereo and SiriusXM Satellite radio offer a variety of entertainment options, ensuring there's something for everyone to enjoy.Stay in Control with the Backup Camera and Blind-Spot DetectionParking and maneuvering are a breeze with the Backup Camera, which provides a clear view of what's behind you. The Blind-Spot Detection system adds an extra layer of safety by alerting you to vehicles in your blind spots, making lane changes safer and more confident. These features make the 2019 Kia Sportage EX a smart choice for drivers who value convenience and safety.Exterior Elegance: Bold Design and Practical FeaturesThe 2019 Kia Sportage EX boasts a bold and modern design that stands out on the road. Its sleek lines and rear spoiler add a sporty touch, while the fog lights and daytime running lights enhance visibility and safety. The alloy wheels provide a stylish finishing touch, and the roof rack adds practicality for carrying extra cargo or outdoor gear. This SUV is as functional as it is eye-catching.Why Choose the 2019 Kia Sportage EX Sport Utility 4D?The 2019 Kia Sportage EX is more than just a vehicleit's a lifestyle upgrade. With its combination of performance, safety, comfort, and technology, this SUV is perfect for families, commuters, and adventurers alike. Whether you're navigating the streets of Fontana or exploring the scenic routes of San Bernardino County, the Kia Sportage delivers a driving experience that's second to none.Visit American Fleet in Fontana, CaliforniaReady to experience the 2019 Kia Sportage EX Sport Utility 4D for yourself? English Description  Overview and Powertrain This 2015 Ford Escape SE is powered by the efficient and responsive EcoBoost 1.6L Turbocharged inline-4 engine, producing 178 horsepower and 184 lb-ft of torque. The compact turbocharged powerplant uses direct injection and an intercooled turbocharger to deliver strong low- and mid-range torque while maintaining competitive fuel economy for daily commuting and highway travel. The engine is factory-mated to Fords smooth-shifting 6-speed automatic transmission with overdrive and manual shift capability (SelectShift), providing effortless city driving and relaxed cruising at speed. This particular example has exceptionally low mileage  under 66,000 miles  which averages to less than 6,000 miles per year, and it presents in excellent overall condition.  Factory-Installed Features  Comfort and Convenience The SE trim of the 2015 Escape is appointed to balance comfort and functionality. Standard factory features include air conditioning with a well-placed climate control interface, cruise control for relaxed highway driving, and a tilt-and-telescoping steering column to optimize driver ergonomics. Power accessories include power windows with drivers one-touch down, power door locks with remote keyless entry, and electrically adjustable side mirrors. Seating is typically cloth-upholstered with supportive bolstering and a split-folding rear seat (60/40) that expands cargo versatility when needed. The drivers seat offers multiple manual adjustments to find a comfortable driving position for drivers of varying heights.  Infotainment and Connectivity From the factory the Escape SE includes Ford SYNC, a voice-activated communications and entertainment system that provides hands-free calling, music control, and USB/Auxiliary inputs for smart device connectivity. An integrated AM/FM/CD player and a multi-function display are standard, delivering clear audio and straightforward access to media and phone features. Steering-wheel-mounted audio and phone controls allow the driver to keep focus on the road while operating common infotainment functions.  Safety and Driver Assistance Safety is well-covered with standard factory equipment including advanced dual front airbags, front-seat side-impact airbags, and full-length side curtain airbags for head protection. Antilock braking system (ABS) with electronic brakeforce distribution (EBD), traction control, and electronic stability control are standard to help maintain control in challenging road conditions. Tire pressure monitoring system (TPMS) is included to assist with tire maintenance and safety. Steering is electrically assisted for light low-speed maneuvering and a communicative feel at speed.  Exterior and Utility Factory exterior appointments for the SE typically include 17-inch alloy wheels, halogen headlamps, integrated daytime running lights, and body-color bumpers and mirrors. Roof rails may be included for additional cargo-carrying flexibility. The rear cargo area is versatile, with a low lift-over height and fold-flat rear seats for transporting larger items. Practical storage cubbies, cupholders, and well-placed door pockets contribute to everyday usability.  Condition, Service and Documentation This example is described as being in excellent overall condition with below-average mileage for its model year. Regular maintenance and inspections are encouraged and records are available upon request. description: At GMC, our engineers are never satisfied. That Is precisely why they took the strongest, most powerful Sierra Heavy Duty pickups ever and used them as a starting point. It is just another example of what incredible thinking can help you achieve The  cabin, redesigned in the 2015,  Sierra HD combines triple door seals, inlaid doors and other refinements throughout the truck to create our quietest HD pickups ever. Add premium materials, supportive seats and generous storage and you have set the new standard in heavy-duty truck interiors. Denali HD takes it a step further with heated and cooled Denali-embossed leather-trimmed front bucket seats, a heated leather wrapped steering wheel, new soft-touch instrument panel with burnished aluminum trim and contrasting stitching.  Sierras ergonomically configured instrument panel places information where it is quickly visible and controls where they are easily under your command. In Sierra Denali, the 8 inch color touch-screen with navigation provides immediate data and dynamic response, while an 8 inch Customizable Driver Display lets you personalize vital information with description: The 2018 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 Custom offers a solid blend of work-ready capability and smart value, finished in a clean Summit White exterior. Powered by the proven EcoTec3 5.3L V8 engine delivering 355 horsepower and 383 lb-ft of torque, this full-size truck provides dependable towing power and confident performance through its efficient 6-speed automatic transmission and a robust electronically controlled two-speed AutoTrac 4WD system for dependable traction when needed.  The purpose-built Custom trim outfits the Silverado with 20-inch wheels, all-season tires, and a distinctive body-color front bumper and grille. Inside, you'll find durable cloth seating surfaces, a vinyl-wrapped steering wheel, and functional, easy-to-clean interior trim. The spacious Double Cab offers ample interior room, along with manual climate control and a 4-speaker audio system with available Chevrolet MyLink connectivity for daily tasks.  Useful technology features include the available Chevrolet MyLink radio with a 7-inch diagonal color touch-screen, Bluetooth streaming audio, and an auxiliary audio input. The Silverado 1500 Custom also boasts a class-leading cargo box with available CornerStep rear bumper and EZ Lift tailgate, a standard rear vision camera, and a durable steel frame for enhanced utility and confidence on the job.  Built for reliable work and value, this Silverado achieves an EPA-estimated 15 MPG city/21 MPG highway while offering a capable 10,500 pounds of maximum towing capacity when properly equipped. description: 2024 Volkswagen Atlas 2.0T SE w/Technology | Spacious Comfort with Confident Efficiency The 2024 Volkswagen Atlas 2.0T SE w/Technology blends confident performance with modern comfort, offering a practical driving experience for families across Hemet and the wider Riverside County. Powered by a 2.0L turbocharged engine delivering 269 horsepower, this front-wheel-drive SUV pairs smooth power delivery with an 8-speed automatic transmission to provide a composed, responsive feel during both city commutes and weekend trips. With an EPA-estimated 20 MPG city and 27 MPG highway, it offers solid efficiency for its size and capability. Inside, the Atlas delivers a well-appointed, flexible cabin with seating for up to seven across three rows. Perforated V-Tex leatherette seats and tri-zone climate control offer comfort for every passenger, while heated and ventilated front seats support year-round usability. Under the hood is Audis legendary 3.0L TFSI supercharged V6 paired with a 6-speed manual transmission and quattro permanent all-wheel drive. Whether you're hauling gear to the campsite or taking the kids to soccer practice, this vehicle ensures that you do it all with comfort and style.  At First Auto Credit Missouri, located at **2990 Old Orchard Rd, Jackson, MO 63755**, we specialize in offering affordable used cars to fit your lifestyle. With **144,549 miles** on the odometer, it still has plenty of life left to tackle your daily adventures. This truck boasts a **6.5-foot bed**, perfect for carrying everything from tools to camping equipment.  Inside, you'll find a spacious tan interior that comfortably seats up to **six passengers**. The adjustable foot pedals and multi-adjustable power seat options ensure that drivers of all sizes will find their ideal driving position. The cabin is outfitted with modern conveniences such as air conditioning, cruise control, and a leather-wrapped steering wheel for added comfort on long drives.  **Safety First**  The Ford F-150 is known for its commitment to safety, and this model is no exception. It features standard equipment like **4-wheel ABS**, child safety door locks, and multiple airbags to protect you and your passengers. With its impressive towing capacity of **up to 11,100 pounds**, you can confidently transport your boat, trailer, or camper for weekend getaways.  **Fuel Efficiency and Practicality**  For a full-size pickup, this F-150 offers a commendable fuel economy with **15 MPG in the city** and **21 MPG on the highway**. This makes it an ideal choice for budget-conscious buyers who need a versatile vehicle without sacrificing performance. The **36-gallon fuel tank** means fewer stops at the pump, allowing you to focus on the journey ahead.  **Local Adventures Await**  Situated in Jackson, MO, this Ford F-150 is not only perfect for family outings but also for exploring the surrounding neighborhoods and attractions. Whether you're heading out to the nearby **Perryville** for a day trip or driving along the scenic **Route 3**, this truck is ready to take you wherever the road leads.  At First Auto Credit Missouri, we understand that buying a vehicle is a significant investment. That's why we offer a wide selection of quality used vehicles and cheap used cars to fit every budget. Our friendly team is here to assist you every step of the way, ensuring you find the perfect vehicle for your needs.  **Why Choose First Auto Credit Missouri?**  As a trusted used car dealer in Jackson, MO, we prioritize customer satisfaction. Our dealership specializes in helping you secure financing, even if you have less-than-perfect credit. Whether you're looking for certified pre-owned options or simply great deals on used cars near you, we're dedicated to making your car-buying experience enjoyable.  Ready to take the next step? Advanced engineering puts our 2013 Ford Explorer XLT 4WD with the Equipment Group 202A shown in beautiful Kodiak Brown Metallic light years ahead of the rest. Powered by a 3.5 Liter V6 offering 290hp tethered to a 6 Speed Automatic transmission to help you own the road. This Four Wheel Drive SUV shows off nearly 25mpg on the road, turning heads with chrome accents, 20-inch wheels, chrome grille, fog lamps, streamlined molding, and overall handsome style.  Look inside this XLT and enjoy modern features designed to help you with your hectic lifestyle. With advanced voice-activated technology, My Ford Touch recognizes commands with a color touchscreen, voice activated navigation, and Wi-Fi connectivity. Power-heated leather seats feel great, especially on cold days. You'll appreciate a nine-speaker audio system, a rearview camera, dual-zone Automatic climate control, and a power-folding third-row seat that easily folds flat for additional cargo space.  Rest assured, you can feel safe with Ford thanks to the six airbags, SOS post-crash alert, tire pressure monitoring, reverse sensing system, and traction control. description: Popular Options and Features Include: Comfort Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower body pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seat cushions.Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Voice activated integrated navigation system - A to B made easy! Whether it's an errand or a road trip, the voice activated integrated navigation system will guide you to your destination.  No more bulky, impossible-to-fold maps, and no more stopping to ask for directions. Just tell it where you want to go, and the voice activated integrated navigation system shows you the right way.   About Dublin Honda Not only are we Honda enthusiasts at Dublin Honda, we're dedicated members of the local community. Ken Harvey opened Dublin Honda in 1977 and has helped literally thousands upon thousands of Happy Honda Owners find and maintain their Hondas. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:      Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close  and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is  and Telematics Voice activated integrated navigation system - A to B made easy! Whether it's an errand or a road trip, the voice activated integrated navigation system will guide you to your destination. Look no further than the stunning 2013 Dodge Journey SE, available now at Carlyle Auto, your go-to Buy Here Pay Here dealership in Rockford, IL. The Dodge Journey is an SUV designed with families in mind, offering ample space for up to five passengers, making it great for growing families or weekend adventures. With a spacious cargo volume of 39.6 cubic feet, it has the room you need for grocery runs, sports equipment, or even a quick getaway. The Journey combines practicality with comfort, featuring standard air conditioning, cruise control, and a well-designed interior that promises a smooth ride.  Under the hood, this 2013 model boasts a reliable 2.4L L4 DOHC engine paired with a 4-speed automatic transmission, ensuring an efficient drive whether you're navigating city streets or cruising on the highway. With an impressive fuel economy of 19 MPG in the city and 26 MPG on the highway, it's an excellent choice for those with long commutes or frequent road trips.  Safety is a top priority, and the Journey is equipped with essential features such as ABS brakes, front and side airbags, child safety door locks, and a vehicle stability control system. This makes it a sensible option for parents who want peace of mind while driving their loved ones around Rockford and nearby neighborhoods like Cherry Valley and Loves Park.   In terms of style, the Dodge Journey stands out with its eye-catching orange exterior, perfectly complemented by alloy wheels and a sporty design. Its features include automatic headlights, keyless entry, and a rear spoiler that not only enhances its aesthetic appeal but also contributes to better aerodynamics.  At Carlyle Auto, we offer flexible financing solutions tailored to your budget. Whether you're exploring bad credit car loans or interested in low down payment cars, our friendly staff will guide you through the process with ease. With our commitment to in-house financing, we make it simple for you to get behind the wheel of this impressive Dodge Journey.  Whether you're commuting to work, running errands, or heading out for a weekend adventure, this Dodge Journey is built to accommodate your lifestyle. Classic Capability and Modern Value: The 2013 Jeep Patriot Latitude The 2013 Jeep Patriot Latitude occupies a unique space in the compact SUV market, offering a bridge between the rugged, no-nonsense spirit of the classic Jeep Cherokee and the comfort requirements of a modern daily driver. It is a vehicle designed for those who appreciate honest, straightforward design and the peace of mind that comes with a go-anywhere heritage. An Iconic, Timeless Silhouette While many of its contemporaries transitioned into soft, car-like crossovers, the Patriot Latitude proudly maintained Jeeps classic, boxy aesthetic. Its upright stance, signature seven-slot grille, and squared-off wheel arches provide a sense of durability and purpose. This design isn't just about looksthe vertical glass and high roofline result in exceptional outward visibility and a cabin that feels far more spacious than its compact footprint suggests. Versatile Performance and 4x4 Confidence The Latitude trim is powered by a reliable 2.4-liter World Engine producing 172 horsepower, providing a solid balance of fuel efficiency and around-town pep. For 2013, the Patriot offered two distinct ways to handle the elements: The Commuter's Choice: Front-wheel drive provides a lighter, more fuel-efficient experience for city dwellers. Freedom Drive I: This active full-time 4WD system with lock mode is the star of the show. It is designed to handle deep snow, heavy rain, and sandy trails with ease, giving the driver total confidence regardless of the season or the surface. Refinement Meets Utility The Latitude trim elevates the Patriot experience by adding several comfort and convenience features that turn the rugged SUV into a refined sanctuary: Premium Appointments: Inside, the Latitude features heated cloth seats, a leather-wrapped steering wheel with integrated audio controls, and power windows and locksfeatures that make the daily commute significantly more pleasant. Smart Cargo Solutions: The rear seats feature a 60/40 split-fold and recline function, allowing you to prioritize passenger comfort or cargo capacity. The fold-flat front passenger seat even allows for the transport of long items like surfboards or ladders. Quiet Ride: Enhanced sound insulation for the 2013 model year ensures that the cabin remains remarkably quiet, effectively isolating road noise and allowing the available Boston Acoustics premium sound system to shine. Dependable Handling The Patriot Latitude is built on a car-based platform that provides a comfortable, compliant ride on paved roads while maintaining enough ground clearance for light off-road adventures. The steering is light and easy to manage in tight parking lots, yet the vehicle feels stable and planted at highway speeds. It strikes a rare balance, offering SUV utility with the maneuverability of a much smaller car. The Verdict The 2013 Jeep Patriot Latitude is an authentic vehicle in an era of imitation. It doesn't pretend to be a high-speed sports car; instead, it excels at being a reliable, capable, and stylish companion for lifes adventures. For the driver who values the classic Jeep look, proven 4x4 capability, and a suite of modern comforts at an exceptional value, the Patriot Latitude is a smart and character-filled choice.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Rear Trunk/Liftgate -
